front: What is the role of peptide-based PROTACs in targeted protein degradation?
back: PROTACs (Proteolysis Targeting Chimeras) recruit E3 ligases to target proteins. Bifunctional molecules: target-binding ligand + linker + E3 ligase ligand. Peptide PROTACs use cell-permeable peptides. Catalytic mechanism enables substoichiometric activity.
